---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the template is broken, misleading, or wrong
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What broke

A clear one-paragraph description of the problem.

## Where

Which file or path is affected. Be specific.

- `path/to/file.md` line N
- Or: the tree diagram in `README.md`
- Or: the `analyze-codebase` skill

## What I expected

What should have happened or what the docs said should happen.

## What actually happened

What did happen. Copy-paste error messages, screenshots, or exact output if helpful.

## How to reproduce

Minimum steps to reproduce, if applicable:

1. Clone the template
2. Run X
3. Observe Y

## Environment

- OS: (macOS, Linux, Windows)
- Claude Code version: (if applicable)
- Other AI tools involved: (Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini)
- Node version: (if relevant)

## Additional context

Anything else worth mentioning.
